basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.short_information: NIT Kurukshetra is recruiting 1 post of JRF/Project Associate-I with M.Tech qualification. Last date to apply is 20 July 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application.
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent in Computer Science & Engineering / Computer Engineering / Information Technology or equivalent with First class (6.5 CGPA out of 10) or 60% marks.

vacancy_details.details: Total 01 position is available for the ANRF-funded project. Note: The position is purely temporary and project-based. No regular appointment or absorption is guaranteed.

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by online interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates should fill the online Google Form only: Apply Here
Candidates must provide correct details and valid email ID. The receipt of application will be acknowledged via reply email.
Documents Required (to be produced at interview):
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and project-based. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The position is extendable till the completion of the project subject to satisfactory performance. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

_labels.apply_online: Eligible candidates should fill the online Google Form only

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Kurukshetra is recruiting 1 post of JRF/Project Associate-I with M.Tech qualification. Last date to apply is 20 July 2026.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_nit_kur: AI-enabled medical image segmentation framework for better clinical decision support
Dr. Vishwas Rathi, Assistant Professor, Department of Computer Engineering
JRF: ₹37,000 (1st & 2nd Year), ₹42,000 (3rd Year) + HRA Project Associate-I: ₹30,000 + HRA

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total 01 position is available for the ANRF-funded project. Note: The position is purely temporary and project-based. No regular appointment or absorption is guaranteed.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application.

rows.details: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent in Computer Science & Engineering / Computer Engineering / Information Technology or equivalent with First class (6.5 CGPA out of 10) or 60% marks.
Research experience in Computer Vision + valid GATE/NET score.
As per ANRF / Institute norms (relaxation as per GoI rules).

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Details
content_sections.text: For JRF: Selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC NET / GATE) or equivalent national level examinations. Fellowship: ₹37,000 per month (1st & 2nd year) and ₹42,000 per month (3rd year) + HRA. For Project Associate-I: Fellowship: ₹30,000 per month + HRA. Other Benefits: The selected candidate will be encouraged to register for Ph.D. at NIT Kurukshetra in Computer Vision subject to meeting institute eligibility criteria.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by online interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates should fill the online Google Form only: Apply Here Candidates must provide correct details and valid email ID. The receipt of application will be acknowledged via reply email. Documents Required (to be produced at interview): Original degree certificates & mark sheets Experience certificates (if any) GATE/NET scorecard (if applicable) Valid photo ID proof

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Kurukshetra JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely temporary and project-based. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The position is extendable till the completion of the project subject to satisfactory performance. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Kurukshetra JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for JRF at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: JRF will receive ₹37,000 per month for the first two years and ₹42,000 in the third year + HRA.

faq.question: Q3. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Kurukshetra Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: GATE/NET is mandatory for the JRF position. For Project Associate-I, it is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. Can final year M.Tech students apply for this JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed M.Tech with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA at the time of application.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for NIT Kurukshetra ANRF recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: “AI-enabled medical image segmentation framework for better clinical decision support”.

faq.question: Q6. Is PhD registration compulsory for selected JRF?
faq.answer: No, it is optional but highly encouraged. The candidate must meet NIT Kurukshetra PhD eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for NIT Kurukshetra JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the online Google Form: https://forms.gle/pCOVzvhB9H9eGdgV7

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the JRF position at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The project duration is 36 months starting from June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for NIT Kurukshetra JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Age limit is as per ANRF and Institute guidelines (relaxation applicable for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q10. Will the selected candidate get any permanent job after the project?
faq.answer: No. This is a purely temporary project-based position with no guarantee of regular employment.
